title: update README.md to remove Debian mentions
body:
ppa install steps mentioned in README.md work only for Ubuntu xenial and
zesty so far.

Signed-off-by: Lokesh Mandvekar <lsm5@fedoraproject.org>

@nalind PTAL

comments.body: I don't know why this testing is failing but it is definitely not caused by this PR.  Merging.
:hourglass: Testing commit a2765bb with merge d624459...
@nalind Are these failures caused by docker.io changing the manifests? Do we need to update containers/image to get tests to run again?
Since this is just a docs change, I am going to ignore the test failues, since they are not caused by this PR.
